items.headline_en: Ollama release feed now shows v0.22.1-rc1
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for Ollama changed and the newest visible tag is v0.22.1-rc1. The feed timestamp is 2026-04-30T01:40:23Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmetic page edit.
